messages.author: Murray
messages.content_html: Anyone based in Highlands/Morayshire?

messages.author: UriYuan
messages.text: I'm not too sure, I'm planning on attempting to get a small mesh up and running around Moray but at the moment am saving funds to be able to build small solar based units to place around. However the closest I've ever seen on the map is Peterhead and Aberdeen.

messages.author: Murray
messages.text: Just seeing this - we’ve built a small mesh around Inverness/blackisle so far you’ll see it on the public map
